method: Built @speech/web before and after importing @speech/ui/tokens.css, then summed generated JS/CSS/HTML/JSON/webmanifest asset sizes and gzip -9 byte counts.
notes: Token plumbing adds semantic CSS custom properties only; no runtime JavaScript dependency is imported by the app shell.
The CSS increase is within the v0.6.0 Dictate initial-JS gate because it does not add JavaScript.
